name: Chicken and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin, bone, and halve the chicken breasts.
2. Lay the chipped beef at the bottom of a baking dish.
3. Place the chicken breasts on top of the beef.
4. Mix the mushroom soup and sour cream in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture over the top of the chicken breasts.
6. Dot with bacon pieces.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake in an oven set to 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-1/2 hours.
